bb-41.1: If you move 1 or fewer hexes on your turn, gain %game.action.shield%1 for the round.

bb-42.1: After moving 4 or more hexes, add +1%game.action.attack% to all your attacks this turn.

bb-44.1: The default top action of your ability cards is %game.action.attack%3 instead of %game.action.attack%2.

bb-45.1: During your attack, %game.elementHalf.consume:ice|light% to add advantage or %game.condition.muddle%.

bb-46.1: During your turn, remove all negative conditions and %game.action.heal%2 self.

20-5.1: The arena sorcerer has 14 hit points.
20-5.2: The goring beetle has 13 hit points.

bb-41.1: Si vous vous déplacez de 1 hexagone ou moins à votre tour, gagnez %game.action.shield% 1 pour le round.

20-5.1: Le Sorcier de l'Arène a 14 points de vie.
20-5.2: Le Scarabée Empaleur a 13 points de vie.

bb-46.1: Podczas swojej tury usuń wszystkie negatywne stany i %game.action.heal%2 na siebie.
